# Codex Status Block Templates

> **Status:** Template reference.
>
> **Validation:** Use with the Codex contribution and review guides.
>
> **Non-claims:** These examples do not validate any feature by themselves.

Copy the weakest accurate block into new Codex pages and replace bracketed placeholders.

## Implemented

```md
> **Status:** Implemented.
>
> **Validation:** Verified by `[test/script/command/release note]`.
>
> **Non-claims:** This page documents `[specific behavior]`; it does not claim `[larger property]`.
```

## Experimental

```md
> **Status:** Experimental.
>
> **Validation:** Available through `[command/path]`; behavior may change.
>
> **Non-claims:** This is not a stable API or production workflow.
```

## Design

```md
> **Status:** Design.
>
> **Validation:** No implementation claim. Review against `[design/source doc]`.
>
> **Non-claims:** This page does not claim the design has been implemented.
```

## Dry-run

```md
> **Status:** Dry-run.
>
> **Validation:** Read-only or no-write path: `[command]`.
>
> **Non-claims:** This page does not claim write capability or completed validation.
```

## Preview

```md
> **Status:** Preview.
>
> **Validation:** Preview artifact or command: `[artifact/command]`.
>
> **Non-claims:** Preview status does not imply stable release readiness.
```

## Roadmap

```md
> **Status:** Roadmap.
>
> **Validation:** Planning item only; no current implementation claim.
>
> **Non-claims:** This page does not claim the roadmap item exists yet.
```

## Not claimed

```md
> **Status:** Not claimed.
>
> **Validation:** This page intentionally defines a boundary or exclusion.
>
> **Non-claims:** `[specific property]` is not claimed at this time.
```
